winner: clearbit_validated — 24 companies passed all 4 validation checks
summary:
Method Comparison Results:
- Gemini Flash (LLM-only): 11/25 passed all checks (23 domains valid, 24 Clearbit found, 16 healthcare, 17 EMEA)
- Brave Search + AI: 13/25 passed all checks (23 domains valid, 22 Clearbit found, 15 healthcare, 17 EMEA)
- Clearbit-validated: 24/25 passed all checks (25 domains valid, 25 Clearbit found, 24 healthcare, 25 EMEA)

Overlap: 5 companies in all three methods.
Winner: clearbit_validated with 24 fully validated companies.

NOTE: Brave Search API key was not configured, so Method 2 used a different Gemini prompt to simulate web-sourced discovery. For a true comparison, configure BRAVE_API_KEY.
